name: NTAO Day 0 Technician Onboarding
description: Critical Day 0 NTAO operational tasks for new technician onboarding

steps.title: Territory Assignment and Setup
steps.description: Assign service territory and configure operational parameters

substeps.title: Assign service territory to new technician
substeps.description: Assign appropriate service territory based on location and capacity

substeps.title: Configure routing profile in dispatch system
substeps.description: Set up technician routing profile for optimal service delivery

substeps.title: Validate service area coverage
substeps.description: Ensure assigned territory provides appropriate service coverage

steps.title: Operational Systems Setup
steps.description: Configure operational systems and communication channels

substeps.title: Set up dispatch communication channel
substeps.description: Configure communication systems for dispatch coordination

substeps.title: Configure service scheduling parameters
substeps.description: Set up scheduling parameters for optimal service delivery

substeps.title: Enable real-time tracking and monitoring
substeps.description: Activate tracking systems for operational visibility

substeps.title: Notify dispatch team of new technician
substeps.description: Inform dispatch team of new technician availability and territory coverage

substeps.title: Update operational capacity planning
substeps.description: Adjust capacity planning models with new technician availability
